# ComponentName

One-sentence description of what this component is.

**Domain:** (e.g. pricing, checkout, dashboard)
**File:** components/<domain>/ComponentName.tsx

---

## Purpose

Two-to-three sentences on what problem this solves. Focus on what it does, not what it looks like.

## When to use

- Specific, concrete usecases
- Where in the product this appears

## When NOT to use

- If you need X, use ComponentY instead
- Cover at least one anti-pattern

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | — | |

## Example usage

```tsx
<ComponentName prop="value" />
```

## Gotchas

- Edge cases and things future-you will forget

## Accessibility

- Keyboard behavior
- ARIA labels
- Screen reader considerations

- Components this composes: ...
